channel.title: Code Map :: Fisk AI
channel.description: A guided deep-dive into the Fisk AI codebase: architecture, subsystems, and the flows that connect them.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: How the packages layer, the interface seams that keep them apart, and how a run composes.

item.title: Tools and Introspection
item.description: How a fisk command tree becomes the tool set an LLM may call, filtered by tags and rules.

item.title: The Agent Loop
item.description: Call the model, run the tools it asks for, feed the results back, all under a budget.

item.title: Safety and Human in the Loop
item.description: How every command runs sandboxed by construction, and how a human gates the ones that matter.

item.title: Sessions and Resume
item.description: A run journaled event by event, so it can be suspended, resumed, or survive a crash.

item.title: Memory
item.description: A small key/value store that lets the model keep durable notes across separate runs.

item.title: Knowledge and RAG
item.description: A local, in-process document index the model can search, lexical by default and semantic on opt-in.

item.title: The Terminal UI
item.description: The full-screen runner, its event-driven render, and the single-writer discipline that keeps it safe.

item.title: MCP and A2A
item.description: Serving the same tools to an MCP client or a peer agent, and importing a peer's tools.

item.title: Reference and Map
item.description: The command surface, a source-file map by package, the key types, and a glossary.
